strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience across fintech-adjacent domains
Current exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Background in high-throughput, low-latency microservices (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) and fintech (RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated CTO or executive leadership experience; titles cap at Staff/Senior IC
No evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or building leadership layers
Agentic AI work appears recent and contributory rather than production multi-agent system ownership

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership track record
Limited production multi-agent AI and fintech-infrastructure ownership

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong craftsmanship, distributed-systems experience, and emerging exposure to agentic AI and MCP tooling. However, the role demands an executive-level technologist with a proven record of scaling 30+ engineering organizations, owning production multi-agent AI systems, and operating in regulated fintech at architectural depth — areas where the resume shows limited or no evidence. Fit is closer to a senior engineer or tech lead than a CTO of a venture-backed fintech scale-up.
